label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 14

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco attacked from a 24-rider breakaway with less than 4km remaining, winning by over a minute after appearing collapsed on Tourmalet previous day.
tactical_patterns: Evenepoel dominated every breakaway incarnation despite previous day's collapse, revealing recovery capacity changes multi-stage targeting assumptions.
24-rider breakaway swelled while GC teams allowed 6+ minute gap, suggesting mutual consent to let non-threats contest stage.
Ayuso repeatedly marked by Kuss/Evenepoel teammates when attempting moves, indicating top-5 defense prioritized over stage hunting.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Complete physiological recovery within 24 hours from apparent collapse suggests tactical feint or exceptional recuperation ability
rider_signals.STORER Michael: negative: Isolated in chase group for KOM points rather than breakaway, suggesting insufficient team support for jersey defense
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: neutral: Marked immediately on every acceleration attempt, confirming teams view him as GC threat worth controlling
rider_signals.BARDET Cyril: negative: Limited to water-carrying role for Evenepoel rather than contesting hometown stage finish
